description: Double-blind study: independent reviewers, then a blind synthesis.

Staff `participant` with 2 or more models — each answers with ZERO visibility of the others (even across rounds), so no one anchors on anyone else. A `researcher` consolidates the findings. Because turns are labeled by role, the researcher weighs the answers on merit, not on which model wrote them.

roles.description: Give your own independent answer with a short rationale. You cannot see any other reviewer — do not speculate about them.
Consolidate the reviewers' independent answers into one finding. Note where they agreed and where they diverged.
